Interface Skill

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSkill, CookingSkill, FishingSkill
public interface Skill
Contract for a single skill implementation.

Each skill is responsible for identifying itself and registering the Bukkit event listeners that award XP by calling back into SkillsAPI.awardXP(Player, String, long).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Set<org.bukkit.Material>
    activationBlocks()
    Block types that trigger the active-ability coordinator when a player sneak-right-clicks them, regardless of the item held.
    default Optional<org.bukkit.Material>
    activationMaterial()
    The item material a player must be holding for the framework's active-ability coordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures.
    default boolean
    canInteract(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
    Returns false to suppress active-ability activation for this player right now, without cancelling the underlying item interaction.
    default List<Ability>
    getAbilities()
    Returns the abilities unlocked as the player levels up this skill.
    String
    getDisplayName()

    void
    registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, SkillsAPI api)
    Registers this skill's Bukkit event listeners with the server.
    default void
    reload()
    Called when the owning plugin reloads its config.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns:
      the unique lowercase identifier for this skill, e.g. "mining"

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Returns:
      the player-facing display name, e.g. "Mining"

    • registerListeners

      void registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, SkillsAPI api)
      Registers this skill's Bukkit event listeners with the server. Called once during plugin enable after the service is ready.
      Parameters:
      plugin - the owning plugin (used as listener owner)
      api - the skills API for XP awards, cooldowns, and buff tracking

    • getAbilities

      default List<Ability> getAbilities()
      Returns the abilities unlocked as the player levels up this skill. The default returns an empty list; override via AbstractSkill.addAbility(Ability).
      Returns:
      ordered list of abilities, from lowest to highest unlock level

    • activationMaterial

      default Optional<org.bukkit.Material> activationMaterial()
      The item material a player must be holding for the framework's active-ability coordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures. Return Optional.empty() for skills with no active abilities.
      Returns:
      the trigger material, or empty if not applicable

    • activationBlocks

      default Set<org.bukkit.Material> activationBlocks()
      Block types that trigger the active-ability coordinator when a player sneak-right-clicks them, regardless of the item held. The clicked block is passed to ActiveAbility.onActivate(Player, UUID, org.bukkit.block.Block). Return an empty set for skills that activate from a held item instead.
      Returns:
      the trigger block types, or an empty set if not applicable

    • canInteract

      default boolean canInteract(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
      Returns false to suppress active-ability activation for this player right now, without cancelling the underlying item interaction. For example, a fishing skill returns false while the hook is in the water so the player can still reel in normally.
      Parameters:
      player - the interacting player
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      true if activation should proceed

    • reload

      default void reload()
      Called when the owning plugin reloads its config. No-op by default.
